# Everything in Perspective

> Essays on trends, context & nuance

Canonical Origin: https://everythinginperspective.github.io/everythinginperspective_purejs

- [Full Content](https://everythinginperspective.github.io/everythinginperspective_purejs/llms-full.txt)

## Featured Routes

- Google Maps: How Location Data Reshapes Urban Planning, Privacy, and Power (LD): https://everythinginperspective.github.io/everythinginperspective_purejs/linked-data/article/google-maps-privacy-urban/
- Instagram and Mental Health: The Hidden Cost of Connection (Mag): https://everythinginperspective.github.io/everythinginperspective_purejs/magazine/article/instagram-mental-health/
- Instagram and Mental Health: The Hidden Cost of Connection (LD): https://everythinginperspective.github.io/everythinginperspective_purejs/linked-data/article/instagram-mental-health/
- Cricket's Global Obsession: Sport as Cultural Identity and Economic Power (Mag): https://everythinginperspective.github.io/everythinginperspective_purejs/magazine/article/crickets-global-obsession/
- Cricket's Global Obsession: Sport as Cultural Identity and Economic Power (LD): https://everythinginperspective.github.io/everythinginperspective_purejs/linked-data/article/crickets-global-obsession/

- E-Commerce Giants: How Amazon and Flipkart Reshaped Retail and Labor (LD): https://everythinginperspective.github.io/everythinginperspective_purejs/linked-data/article/ecommerce-giants-market-dominance/
